rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid annex scopes matching component type or implementation as appropriate
Validator diagnostics pointing to unresolved identifiers should be fixed by ensuring all references are visible in the current scope
generic_rules: AGREE assumptions and guarantees must reference only visible AADL features or declared helpers
Property associations in AGREE must point to valid AADL properties or be removed if invalid
Repair actions should only modify the specific diagnostic location without affecting unrelated architecture
When AGREE reports type mismatches, align helper declarations with the actual expression types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use only identifiers visible in the current AADL scope for AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers in AGREE that are not present in the model
Do not attempt to fix diagnostics by adding new architecture elements outside the scope of the error
irrelevant_topics: component type vs implementation scope distinctions
